title: Smoker Studies the Reports
description: On pages 0–5, smoker studies the reports as the Straw Hats escape Little Garden with help from Dorry and Brogy, but Nami’s worsening illness makes the next destination urgent.
scene: Smoker Studies the Reports. The Straw Hats escape Little Garden with help from Dorry and Brogy, but Nami’s worsening illness makes the next destination urgent. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.
